hero.title: We help companies stabilize operations before problems become crises.
hero.subtitle: We step into organizations five minutes before midnight - restructuring teams, setting up processes, and restoring functional collaboration. With respect for people and business.

why.title: Why Companies Choose HumanSoft.IT
why.description: When a company grows, pressure on people, processes, and leadership multiplies. What used to work is no longer enough - chaos grows, competencies become unclear, and teams get exhausted.
why.conclusion: We help turn these situations into opportunities for change and stabilization.

services.title: What We Do
services.quote: Our goal is not to deliver a document. Our goal is a company that actually works.

restructuring.title: Organization and Team Restructuring
items: mapping current state, roles, and responsibilities
designing new structure and decision lines

leadership.title: Leadership and Team Development
items: working with managers and key people

team.title: We Are Change Partners - Not External Auditors
team.subtitle: We do not come to companies from above. We work with people, listen to context, and together with teams find solutions that make sense in practice. Each of us brings different experience - together we form a combination of analytical view, human approach, and change driver.

member1.name: Jan Novak
member1.description: I specialize in complex transformations of companies in growth phase. I bring a structured view of processes and ability to connect strategy with operations.

member2.name: Petra Svobodova
member2.description: I work with leaders on building their authentic leadership style. I bring tools for effective communication and collaboration to teams.

member3.name: Martin Cerny
member3.description: I map and design processes that actually work. I connect analytical approach with practical implementation in real environment.

contact.title: Want Change Before It Is Too Late?
contact.subtitle: Get in touch - we will review your situation and suggest next steps.

evaluation.title: Evaluate Your Company
evaluation.subtitle: Find out how your company is doing and where opportunities for improvement lie.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Insights and experiences from company transformation practice.

references.title: References
references.subtitle: Stories of companies we have helped.

case1.title: Technology Company, 150 Employees
case1.situation: Rapid growth led to chaos in roles and responsibilities. Three departments worked in parallel on the same tasks.
case1.approach: State diagnostics, design of new organizational structure, facilitation of transition with key stakeholders.
case1.result: Clear team structure, 40% reduction in duplicities, increased employee satisfaction.

case2.title: Manufacturing Company, Family Business
case2.situation: Generational change in leadership, unclear vision and tension between old and new management.
case2.approach: Working with both generations, facilitating strategic workshops, coaching new leadership.
case2.result: Smooth leadership transition, new strategic vision shared by the entire team.

case3.title: IT Agency, Scale-up Phase
case3.situation: Growth from 20 to 80 people in 2 years. Processes did not exist, everything depended on individuals.
case3.approach: Mapping key processes, standardizing workflow, implementing documentation and onboarding.
case3.result: Scalable processes, 60% reduction in onboarding time, stable operations.
